query: INSERT INTO skill_secrets (id, user_id, skill_id, var_name, var_value, is_secret, encrypted_value, value_nonce, key_version) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, '', true, $5, $6, 1) ON CONFLICT (user_id, skill_id, var_name) DO UPDATE SET var_value = '', is_secret = true, encrypted_value = EXCLUDED.encrypted_value, value_nonce = EXCLUDED.value_nonce, key_version = EXCLUDED.key_version, updated_at = NOW()
